  <line x1="480" y1="648.0" x2="600" y2="648.0" stroke="#0984E3" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <text x="540" y="243.0" text-anchor="middle" fill="#0984E3" font-size="48" font-family="'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif" font-weight="400">🤖</text>
  <text x="540" y="432.0" text-anchor="middle" fill="#2D3436" font-size="42" font-weight="bold" font-family="'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif">AI活用５ステップ</text>
  <text x="540" y="567.0" text-anchor="middle" fill="#636E72" font-size="24" font-family="'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif">変わる働き方</text>
  <text x="540" y="783.0" text-anchor="middle" fill="#636E72" font-size="28" font-family='Noto Sans JP', sans-serif">AIは「代替」ではなく</text>
<text x="540" y="825.0" text-anchor="middle" fill="#636E72" font-size="28" font-family='Noto Sans JP', sans-serif">「拡張」ツール</text>

  
</svg>
